title: DonatJS LMS: Minimalist Client-Side Router & UI Engine
description: A zero-dependency, no-build-step, JSON-driven micro-framework for rendering structured data as dynamic web interfaces entirely on the client side. DonatJS LMS transforms declarative page objects into rendered components — hero sections, feature cards, quiz engines, certificate verifiers, and structured learning modules — without any external libraries or build toolchains. Designed for resource-constrained educational environments where simplicity, performance, and deployability take priority over ecosystem complexity. The framework lineage traces from Ktupad (2019, PHP/MVC) to BayamJS (2023, JS/MVC) to DonatJS (2024–2026, JSON-driven CSR).

creators.name: Sismadi, Wawan
creators.affiliation: Universitas IPWIJA / PT Sismadi Langit Solusi

references: Sismadi, W. (2024). DonatJS: Zero-Dependency JSON-Driven Micro-Framework. Universitas IPWIJA.
Sismadi, W. (2026). Arsitektur Piawai Mengajar (Manuscript, 9 chapters). UAD.
notes: Framework lineage: Ktupad (2019, PHP/MVC) → BayamJS (2023, JS/MVC) → DonatJS (2024, JSON-driven CSR). HKI Copyright registration: EC00202414144. Patent application: S00202603129 (DJKI). Lighthouse metrics — Performance: 98, Accessibility: 92, Best Practices: 100, SEO: 90.
